TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Atomo ga niya mki sku Hualien Keng atu Kongbu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 81 buwan, 209 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 76% kyan ku 159 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 24% kyan ku 50 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 74%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Atomo hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Atomo hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Atomo hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Atomo hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Atomo hya' ga Tafalong. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ atomo ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħualien keŋ atu koŋβu ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na atomo ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na atomo ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na atomo ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na atomo ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na atomo ħjaʔ ɣa ta*aloŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Atomo ga niya mki sku Hualien Keng atu Kongbu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 81 buwan, 209 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 76% kyan ku 159 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 24% kyan ku 50 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 74%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Atomo hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Atomo hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Atomo hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Atomo hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Atomo hya' ga Tafalong. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ atomo ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħualien keŋ atu koŋβu ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na atomo ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na atomo ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na atomo ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na atomo ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na atomo ħjaʔ ɣa ta*aloŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
